---
id: handle-remove-member
title: "Remove a member"
description: "Removes a user from the organization. Owners can remove anyone except the last owner. Admins can remove members but not owners. Any member can remove themselves"
sidebar_label: "Remove a member"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove a member"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{id}/members/{user_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes a user from the organization. Owners can remove anyone except the last owner. Admins can remove members but not owners. Any member can remove themselves

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
